propositions: CLAUDE.md is bloated (665 lines) and duplicates large parts of docs/, degrading instruction-following since it loads every session.
Agent guidance is Claude-only and must migrate to the cross-vendor AGENTS.md standard so any harness picks up rebar's dev guidance from a single canonical source.
AGENTS.md becomes the canonical lean root file (target ≤200 lines) with CLAUDE.md reduced to a thin @AGENTS.md pointer and duplicated bulk pushed into docs/.
A provider-neutral templates/AGENTS.md must ship for client projects with a drift-guard test syncing a delimited region against the authoritative docs.
Example skills must be de-branded and generalized, renaming examples/claude-skills to a provider-neutral directory in SKILL.md format.
Provider-config scaffolding (.codex/config.toml, .agents/rules/rebar.md) is untracked/git-excluded and must be brought under version control pointing at AGENTS.md.
